_comment: Maps each ground-truth DTx name (Test_Datasets/test_dataset_benchmarking_numbers.json) to the pipeline DTx group(s) identified by (country, slug) in the Phase 3 combined outputs. Used only for per-DTx reporting and coverage; study matching itself is done on globally unique identifiers and does not depend on this file. 'covered' = the pipeline returned at least one VERIFIED study for this DTx (it has rows in the Phase 3 output). 'uncovered' = the pipeline DID process this DTx (an evidence folder with candidates/ and rejected/ exists under evidence/<country>/<slug>) but verified ZERO studies, so there are no Phase 3 rows and nothing to evaluate; every GT study for it is therefore a forced miss. These are not DTx that were skipped.
uncovered: Selfapy's online course for chronic pain
Selfapy's online course for panic disorder
